props.lede: Ground Level Contracting prepares land for development — delivering excavation, foundations, drainage, and civil infrastructure for project managers and site supervisors across Barrie, Midland, Orillia, and Simcoe County.

props.intro: From initial site clearing through drainage, hauling, and winter operations, Ground Level Contracting delivers end-to-end excavation and civil infrastructure services for commercial builds across Barrie, Midland, Orillia, and Simcoe County.

props.body: Ground Level Contracting is a commercial excavation and civil infrastructure company serving project managers and site supervisors across Barrie, Midland, Orillia, and Simcoe County. We prepare land for development — solving geotechnical challenges efficiently and safely, so your build can proceed on schedule.
props.photoAlt: Excavation and site work — Ground Level Contracting crew on a commercial site

props.intro: From initial site clearing through drainage, hauling, and winter operations, Ground Level Contracting delivers end-to-end excavation and civil infrastructure services for commercial builds across Barrie, Midland, Orillia, and Simcoe County.

props.body: We have the human resources, expertise, experience, and financial stability to respond quickly and complete projects safely and successfully. Our teams are built for commercial-scale work where timelines are non-negotiable and site conditions are rarely simple.

reasons.title: Rapid Mobilization
reasons.text: Equipment and crews on-site fast. Built for urgent commercial dispatch.

reasons.title: Geotechnical Depth
reasons.text: We solve challenging ground conditions — rock, clay, high water table — without delaying your build.

reasons.title: PM-Friendly Communication
reasons.text: Direct lines, daily updates, and documentation that keeps your project files clean.

reasons.title: Single-Source Accountability
reasons.text: One contractor across excavation, drainage, and clearing — fewer handoffs, tighter coordination.

steps.title: Site Consultation
steps.desc: Call or email us with your site address and scope. We review conditions and provide a clear assessment.

steps.title: Detailed Quote
steps.desc: We provide transparent, itemized pricing with no hidden costs. Scope is confirmed before any equipment moves.

steps.title: Crew Mobilization
steps.desc: Our equipment and operators are mobilized to your site efficiently. Safety protocols and site prep completed on day one.

steps.title: Delivery & Signoff
steps.desc: Work completed to spec, site documentation provided, and signoff confirmed. Your build can proceed on schedule.

props.body: Ground Level Contracting is based in Barrie and operates commercially throughout our defined service territory. We move quickly across Barrie, Midland, Orillia, and Simcoe County — no extended mobilization delays.

props.sub: Ground Level Contracting is built for commercial relationships. Here's what the teams we work with have to say.

items.quote: Ground Level mobilized faster than any contractor we'd used before. Site was prepped and ready two days ahead of our concrete pour — that kind of reliability is rare.
items.name: Marcus T.

items.quote: We brought them in on a challenging Simcoe County site with heavy rock. They diagnosed the issue, adjusted their approach same day, and kept us on schedule. Exactly who you want on complex ground.
items.name: Diane P.

items.quote: Professional, communicative, and thorough. The drainage install was clean, documented properly, and the final grading passed inspection first time. Will be using Ground Level on all our Simcoe County projects going forward.
items.name: James R.

props.sub: Commercial projects across Barrie, Midland, Orillia, and Simcoe County. Affordable, reliable, satisfaction guaranteed.
